comments.author: @Xscv-j7v
comments.text: Manifesting never worked for me and I felt genuinely crap about it. Watched everyone else talk about it like it was second nature while I just sat there feeling broken. Took Vera Hart's archetype quiz purely out of desperation, honestly didn't expect anything. Matched me exactly. Like, uncomfortably exact. Didn't see that coming at all. If you've been beating yourself up over this too, just try it. Costs you two minutes. ❤️
